TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ca-ke-luy-pu, title = Ca-ke-luy-pu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ca-ke-luy-pu} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ca-ke-luy-pu "Ke-low-ay-su-ys a kamu, Zagreb(z«éňź…°reb) , Ted-a kamu malumayay a nipangangan Agram, A-ke-la-mu, Swng -ya-li a kamu, Z√°gr√°b" nu Ke-low-ay-si-ya a angangan atu Ca-ke-luy-pu a kuwan nu saayaway a seybu mahiza sa u satabakiay hamin nu kanatal, caay sakuwan a tukay. Ca-ke-luy-pu tini i enal nu bay utu 122m "400 a depah", kitizaan tini i Ke-low-ay-si-ya a satip saamisanay a Mey-te-wi-te-nice-san-nan-pow, labu iza ku Sa-wa a sa'wac muculil. :Zagreb(z«éňź…°reb) ÔľõŚĺ∑Ť™ěŤąäÁ®Ī:Agram,ťėŅś†ľśčČŚßÜÔľõŚĆąÁČôŚą©Ť™ě:Z√°gr√°b) 122m(400ŤčĪŚįļ), . nilaculan 1094 a mihcaan i sawalianay a Ka-pu-tu-al kiwkay a sakuwan nu kitizaan, "Ca-ke-luy-pu" uyni a nganga maazih tu i likisi a cudad. i 1845 a mihcaan Yang-ke.Ka-maw-bu mala nu Ca-ke-luy-pu nu saayaway a kinciw. i 1945 a mihcaan kilul tu kakatuud nu tademaw atu malahad ku tukay, Ca-ke-luy-pu mala angangan tu nu Ke-low-ay-si-ya. Ca-ke-luy-pu i Ke-low-ay-si-ya pikawawan micidek ku ngangan "sakuwan tu tukay". makiwan makakilac tu 17 a kitizaan, hatu tini i kaisasaay a hekal nu bayu a diheb nu Sa-wa. Ca-ke-luy-pu nu Ke-low-ay-si-ya hamin nu kanatal, Si-ow atu Ti-cong-hay atu walian a timul Ow-co nu kahenulan a saculilan. Ca-ke-luy-pu iza henay pasayzaay nu zumaan a kanatal tu kanatalay a silamalay. labu nu tukay iza hena ku saculilan nu dingkiay a kazizeng. i kunng-yen c ac ay lasubu a mkihc aan hawsa, ayza u Ca-ke-luy-pu kitizaan nu tukuay u An-ta-tung-ni-ya "Andautonia" caca kasumamadanay a niyazu' nu Low-ma, tini ayzaay a S-ci-ta-al-ye-ow. "Ca-ke-luy-pu" a ngangan saayaway tahkal i 1094 a mihcaan tu nisulitan, tawya Ca-ke-luy-pu iza tusa ku kahenulan a kalcapuan. sawalianay a Ka-pu-al, u kitizaay nu tabakiay a kiwkay nu Ca-ke-luy-pu, angangan nu mikawaway tu nu kiwkay a kitizaan. satipay ku tabakiay tu Ke-la-tay-ce, angangan aenengan nu malukay atu misiwbayay. Ke-la-tay-c atu Ca-ke-luy-pu i 1851 a mihcaan mapapulung nu Ye-si-pu.ye-la-ci nu mikuwanay. malecad ye-la-ci cung-tu a putah u sapikining cinizaan a misanga' patizeng. i Nan-s-la-bu-se-huy cu-i lyan-pang-kung-he-kow a zidayan, Ca-ke-luy-pu sa u kahenulan amin nu kanatal kitizaan nu kezay atu hamin nu sakatus nu tabakiay a tukay. Ke-low-ay-si-ya i 1991 a mihcaan u binawlan ku misingkiway, musakamu Ca-ke-luy-pu mala u angangan a tukay. Ke-low-ay-si-ya a kusi hamin sanad i Ca-ke-luy-pu, pasumukin, nn dingkiay, pitenun, hwa-sye, misanga'ay tu sapayu, in-swa, bukulay, mikawaway izaw ku gingku, miliwkuay, pasiwbayay hatini. Ca-ke-luy-pu i 2004 a mihcaan tademaw palalecad kanatal a nisanga'an katukuh 23,730 ku kalisiw "o-ming palalecad 28,114 ku kalisiw". 2005 a mihcaan palalecad nayay ku pisakawawan pakala tu 8% pasentu, malatusa ku nayay ku pisakawawan nu kanatal.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu "k…ô-r~…ĺow-aj-su-js a kamu, zagr…ôb(z***r…ôb) , t…ôd-a kamu mar~…ĺumajaj a nipaŇčaŇčan agram, a-k…ô-r~…ĺa-mu, swŇč -ja-r~…ĺi a kamu, z*gr*b" nu k…ô-r~…ĺow-aj-si-ja a aŇčaŇčan atu ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu a kuwan nu saajawaj a s…ôbu mańßiza sa u satabakiaj ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ, ¶aaj sakuwan a tukaj. ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu tini i …ônar~…ĺ nu baj utu ***m "*** a d…ôpańß", kitizaan tini i k…ô-r~…ĺow-aj-si-ja a satip saamisanaj a m…ô-t…ô-wi-t…ô-ni ¶…ô-san-nan-pow, r~…ĺabu iza ku sa-wa a sa Ē~ °wa ¶ mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. :zagr…ôb(z***r…ôb) *****:agram,*********:z*gr*b) ***m(*****), . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan **** a mińß ¶aan i sawar~…ĺianaj a ka-pu-tu-ar~…ĺ kiwkaj a sakuwan nu kitizaan, " ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu" ujni a ŇčaŇča maazińß tu i r~…ĺikisi a ¶udad. i **** a mińß ¶aan jaŇč-k…ô.ka-maw-bu mar~…ĺa nu ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu nu saajawaj a kin ¶iw. i **** a mińß ¶aan kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu kakatuud nu tad…ômaw atu mar~…ĺańßad ku tukaj, ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu mar~…ĺa aŇčaŇčan tu nu k…ô-r~…ĺow-aj-si-ja. ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu i k…ô-r~…ĺow-aj-si-ja pikawawan mi ¶id…ôk ku ŇčaŇčan "sakuwan tu tukaj". makiwan makakir~…ĺa ¶ tu ** a kitizaan, ńßatu tini i kaisasaaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu baju a dińß…ôb nu sa-wa. ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu nu k…ô-r~…ĺow-aj-si-ja ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ, si-ow atu ti- ¶oŇč-ńßaj atu war~…ĺian a timur~…ĺ ow- ¶o nu kańß…ônur~…ĺan a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu iza ńß…ônaj pasajzaaj nu zumaan a kanatar~…ĺ tu kanatar~…ĺaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj. r~…ĺabu nu tukaj iza ńß…ôna ku sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu diŇčkiaj a kaziz…ôŇč. i kunŇč-j…ôn ¶ a ¶ aj r~…ĺasubu a mkińß ¶ aan ńßawsa, ajza u ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu kitizaan nu tukuaj u an-ta-tuŇč-ni-ja "andautonia" ¶a ¶a kasumamadanaj a nijazu Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺow-ma, tini ajzaaj a s- ¶i-ta-ar~…ĺ-j…ô-ow. " ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu" a ŇčaŇčan saajawaj tańßkar~…ĺ i **** a mińß ¶aan tu nisur~…ĺitan, tawja ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu iza tusa ku kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kar~…ĺ ¶apuan. sawar~…ĺianaj a ka-pu-ar~…ĺ, u kitizaaj nu tabakiaj a kiwkaj nu ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu, aŇčaŇčan nu mikawawaj tu nu kiwkaj a kitizaan. satipaj ku tabakiaj tu k…ô-r~…ĺa-taj- ¶…ô, aŇčaŇčan a…ôn…ôŇčan nu mar~…ĺukaj atu misiwbajaj. k…ô-r~…ĺa-taj- ¶ atu ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu i **** a mińß ¶aan mapapur~…ĺuŇč nu j…ô-si-pu.j…ô-r~…ĺa- ¶i nu mikuwanaj. mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad j…ô-r~…ĺa- ¶i ¶uŇč-tu a putańß u sapikiniŇč ¶inizaan a misaŇča Ē~ ° patiz…ôŇč. i nan-s-r~…ĺa-bu-s…ô-ńßuj ¶u-i r~…ĺjan-paŇč-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kow a zidajan, ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu sa u kańß…ônur~…ĺan amin nu kanatar~…ĺ kitizaan nu k…ôzaj atu ńßamin nu sakatus nu tabakiaj a tukaj. k…ô-r~…ĺow-aj-si-ja i **** a mińß ¶aan u binawr~…ĺan ku misiŇčkiwaj, musakamu ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu mar~…ĺa u aŇčaŇčan a tukaj. k…ô-r~…ĺow-aj-si-ja a kusi ńßamin sanad i ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu, pasumukin, nn diŇčkiaj, pit…ônun, ńßwa-sj…ô, misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu sapaju, in-swa, bukur~…ĺaj, mikawawaj izaw ku giŇčku, mir~…ĺiwkuaj, pasiwbajaj ńßatini. ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu i **** a mińß ¶aan tad…ômaw par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad kanatar~…ĺ a nisaŇča Ē~ °an katukuńß **,*** ku kar~…ĺisiw "o-miŇč par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad **,*** ku kar~…ĺisiw". **** a mińß ¶aan par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad najaj ku pisakawawan pakar~…ĺa tu *% pas…ôntu, mar~…ĺatusa ku najaj ku pisakawawan nu kanatar~…ĺ.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ca-ke-luy-pu "Ke-low-ay-su-ys a kamu, Zagreb(z«éňź…°reb) , Ted-a kamu malumayay a nipangangan Agram, A-ke-la-mu, Swng -ya-li a kamu, Z√°gr√°b" nu Ke-low-ay-si-ya a angangan atu Ca-ke-luy-pu a kuwan nu saayaway a seybu mahiza sa u satabakiay hamin nu kanatal, caay sakuwan a tukay. Ca-ke-luy-pu tini i enal nu bay utu 122m "400 a depah", kitizaan tini i Ke-low-ay-si-ya a satip saamisanay a Mey-te-wi-te-nice-san-nan-pow, labu iza ku Sa-wa a sa'wac muculil. :Zagreb(z«éňź…°reb) ÔľõŚĺ∑Ť™ěŤąäÁ®Ī:Agram,ťėŅś†ľśčČŚßÜÔľõŚĆąÁČôŚą©Ť™ě:Z√°gr√°b) 122m(400ŤčĪŚįļ), . nilaculan 1094 a mihcaan i sawalianay a Ka-pu-tu-al kiwkay a sakuwan nu kitizaan, "Ca-ke-luy-pu" uyni a nganga maazih tu i likisi a cudad. i 1845 a mihcaan Yang-ke.Ka-maw-bu mala nu Ca-ke-luy-pu nu saayaway a kinciw. i 1945 a mihcaan kilul tu kakatuud nu tademaw atu malahad ku tukay, Ca-ke-luy-pu mala angangan tu nu Ke-low-ay-si-ya. Ca-ke-luy-pu i Ke-low-ay-si-ya pikawawan micidek ku ngangan "sakuwan tu tukay". makiwan makakilac tu 17 a kitizaan, hatu tini i kaisasaay a hekal nu bayu a diheb nu Sa-wa. Ca-ke-luy-pu nu Ke-low-ay-si-ya hamin nu kanatal, Si-ow atu Ti-cong-hay atu walian a timul Ow-co nu kahenulan a saculilan. Ca-ke-luy-pu iza henay pasayzaay nu zumaan a kanatal tu kanatalay a silamalay. labu nu tukay iza hena ku saculilan nu dingkiay a kazizeng. i kunng-yen c ac ay lasubu a mkihc aan hawsa, ayza u Ca-ke-luy-pu kitizaan nu tukuay u An-ta-tung-ni-ya "Andautonia" caca kasumamadanay a niyazu' nu Low-ma, tini ayzaay a S-ci-ta-al-ye-ow. "Ca-ke-luy-pu" a ngangan saayaway tahkal i 1094 a mihcaan tu nisulitan, tawya Ca-ke-luy-pu iza tusa ku kahenulan a kalcapuan. sawalianay a Ka-pu-al, u kitizaay nu tabakiay a kiwkay nu Ca-ke-luy-pu, angangan nu mikawaway tu nu kiwkay a kitizaan. satipay ku tabakiay tu Ke-la-tay-ce, angangan aenengan nu malukay atu misiwbayay. Ke-la-tay-c atu Ca-ke-luy-pu i 1851 a mihcaan mapapulung nu Ye-si-pu.ye-la-ci nu mikuwanay. malecad ye-la-ci cung-tu a putah u sapikining cinizaan a misanga' patizeng. i Nan-s-la-bu-se-huy cu-i lyan-pang-kung-he-kow a zidayan, Ca-ke-luy-pu sa u kahenulan amin nu kanatal kitizaan nu kezay atu hamin nu sakatus nu tabakiay a tukay. Ke-low-ay-si-ya i 1991 a mihcaan u binawlan ku misingkiway, musakamu Ca-ke-luy-pu mala u angangan a tukay. Ke-low-ay-si-ya a kusi hamin sanad i Ca-ke-luy-pu, pasumukin, nn dingkiay, pitenun, hwa-sye, misanga'ay tu sapayu, in-swa, bukulay, mikawaway izaw ku gingku, miliwkuay, pasiwbayay hatini. Ca-ke-luy-pu i 2004 a mihcaan tademaw palalecad kanatal a nisanga'an katukuh 23,730 ku kalisiw "o-ming palalecad 28,114 ku kalisiw". 2005 a mihcaan palalecad nayay ku pisakawawan pakala tu 8% pasentu, malatusa ku nayay ku pisakawawan nu kanatal.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu "k…ô-r~…ĺow-aj-su-js a kamu, zagr…ôb(z***r…ôb) , t…ôd-a kamu mar~…ĺumajaj a nipaŇčaŇčan agram, a-k…ô-r~…ĺa-mu, swŇč -ja-r~…ĺi a kamu, z*gr*b" nu k…ô-r~…ĺow-aj-si-ja a aŇčaŇčan atu ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu a kuwan nu saajawaj a s…ôbu mańßiza sa u satabakiaj ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ, ¶aaj sakuwan a tukaj. ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu tini i …ônar~…ĺ nu baj utu ***m "*** a d…ôpańß", kitizaan tini i k…ô-r~…ĺow-aj-si-ja a satip saamisanaj a m…ô-t…ô-wi-t…ô-ni ¶…ô-san-nan-pow, r~…ĺabu iza ku sa-wa a sa Ē~ °wa ¶ mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. :zagr…ôb(z***r…ôb) *****:agram,*********:z*gr*b) ***m(*****), . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan **** a mińß ¶aan i sawar~…ĺianaj a ka-pu-tu-ar~…ĺ kiwkaj a sakuwan nu kitizaan, " ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu" ujni a ŇčaŇča maazińß tu i r~…ĺikisi a ¶udad. i **** a mińß ¶aan jaŇč-k…ô.ka-maw-bu mar~…ĺa nu ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu nu saajawaj a kin ¶iw. i **** a mińß ¶aan kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu kakatuud nu tad…ômaw atu mar~…ĺańßad ku tukaj, ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu mar~…ĺa aŇčaŇčan tu nu k…ô-r~…ĺow-aj-si-ja. ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu i k…ô-r~…ĺow-aj-si-ja pikawawan mi ¶id…ôk ku ŇčaŇčan "sakuwan tu tukaj". makiwan makakir~…ĺa ¶ tu ** a kitizaan, ńßatu tini i kaisasaaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu baju a dińß…ôb nu sa-wa. ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu nu k…ô-r~…ĺow-aj-si-ja ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ, si-ow atu ti- ¶oŇč-ńßaj atu war~…ĺian a timur~…ĺ ow- ¶o nu kańß…ônur~…ĺan a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu iza ńß…ônaj pasajzaaj nu zumaan a kanatar~…ĺ tu kanatar~…ĺaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj. r~…ĺabu nu tukaj iza ńß…ôna ku sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu diŇčkiaj a kaziz…ôŇč. i kunŇč-j…ôn ¶ a ¶ aj r~…ĺasubu a mkińß ¶ aan ńßawsa, ajza u ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu kitizaan nu tukuaj u an-ta-tuŇč-ni-ja "andautonia" ¶a ¶a kasumamadanaj a nijazu Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺow-ma, tini ajzaaj a s- ¶i-ta-ar~…ĺ-j…ô-ow. " ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu" a ŇčaŇčan saajawaj tańßkar~…ĺ i **** a mińß ¶aan tu nisur~…ĺitan, tawja ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu iza tusa ku kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kar~…ĺ ¶apuan. sawar~…ĺianaj a ka-pu-ar~…ĺ, u kitizaaj nu tabakiaj a kiwkaj nu ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu, aŇčaŇčan nu mikawawaj tu nu kiwkaj a kitizaan. satipaj ku tabakiaj tu k…ô-r~…ĺa-taj- ¶…ô, aŇčaŇčan a…ôn…ôŇčan nu mar~…ĺukaj atu misiwbajaj. k…ô-r~…ĺa-taj- ¶ atu ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu i **** a mińß ¶aan mapapur~…ĺuŇč nu j…ô-si-pu.j…ô-r~…ĺa- ¶i nu mikuwanaj. mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad j…ô-r~…ĺa- ¶i ¶uŇč-tu a putańß u sapikiniŇč ¶inizaan a misaŇča Ē~ ° patiz…ôŇč. i nan-s-r~…ĺa-bu-s…ô-ńßuj ¶u-i r~…ĺjan-paŇč-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kow a zidajan, ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu sa u kańß…ônur~…ĺan amin nu kanatar~…ĺ kitizaan nu k…ôzaj atu ńßamin nu sakatus nu tabakiaj a tukaj. k…ô-r~…ĺow-aj-si-ja i **** a mińß ¶aan u binawr~…ĺan ku misiŇčkiwaj, musakamu ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu mar~…ĺa u aŇčaŇčan a tukaj. k…ô-r~…ĺow-aj-si-ja a kusi ńßamin sanad i ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu, pasumukin, nn diŇčkiaj, pit…ônun, ńßwa-sj…ô, misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu sapaju, in-swa, bukur~…ĺaj, mikawawaj izaw ku giŇčku, mir~…ĺiwkuaj, pasiwbajaj ńßatini. ¶a-k…ô-r~…ĺuj-pu i **** a mińß ¶aan tad…ômaw par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad kanatar~…ĺ a nisaŇča Ē~ °an katukuńß **,*** ku kar~…ĺisiw "o-miŇč par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad **,*** ku kar~…ĺisiw". **** a mińß ¶aan par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad najaj ku pisakawawan pakar~…ĺa tu *% pas…ôntu, mar~…ĺatusa ku najaj ku pisakawawan nu kanatar~…ĺ.
